Extensions.File:
Start-Transcript -Path "C:\Windows\Temp\SteamInstall.log"
$uri = "https://cdn.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/client/installer/SteamSetup.exe" $file = Join-Path $env:TEMP "SteamSetup.exe"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $uri -OutFile $file Start-Process -FilePath $file -ArgumentList "/S" -Wait
Start-Sleep -Seconds 15 Remove-Item $file -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Stop-Transcript
